response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song 'ぴんこすてぃっくLuv' from on-screen title. Searched for lyrics using Japanese title and composer 'ギガP'/'ギガ'. Found full lyrics on multiple sites (Joysound, Vocaro Wikidot). 2. Identified song '誰でもいいから付き合いたい' from on-screen text, which also credited '40mP' as composer. Searched for lyrics using title and composer, but the results only returned incorrect songs or unrelated content. Decided to leave lyrics fields as null for this song as search failed. 3. Mapped the remaining video segments to skits and transition animations.
response.global_summary: The video features two musical performances by various Hololive members, interspersed with skits in a meeting room and landscape mode transition animations. The first song is 'ぴんこすてぃっくLuv' (Pinky SticK Luv) and the second is '誰でもいいから付き合いたい' (Dare demo ii kara tsukiaitai).

scenes.description: The video begins with the song 'ぴんこすてぃっくLuv', performed by La+ Darknesss and Hakui Koyori. They dance on a stage with a purple and black theme.

なんて妄想ですます憂いのshow
こっち向いてまってまってやっぱ向いて恥ずかしいだけど
こっち向いて君の目に映った自分の顔が赤いはずがして
目が合った手が触れたそれだけで一大事なんだもん
ねぇだって「君のことが」この先がどうしてなの言えないの

思うだけで幸せなのほんとはちょっと切ない
口を出る強がり見抜いて寂しがり
実はもう限界越えてんのだけど言えるはずない言えるわけない
臆病なハートに後押ししてwant me?
こっち向いてまってまってやっぱ向いて独り占めしたいの

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Until the clock hand goes from 12 to 12
My mind is dyed with Pinky SticK Luv
Just by passing each other or our eyes meeting suddenly
I feel like I'm floating in space, but you don't know that
Say yeah
I want to hold hands, I want to kiss, within a 10-meter radius of you
But it doesn't come true, so today too is a practice day for kissing the faucet in my delusions
I'm emotional about you because I like you
Look this way, wait wait, look at me after all, I want to monopolize you
Look this way, I know I'm being selfish, but, but, but, but
Our eyes meet, my heart beats fast, I turn red, I'm making a hundred faces
Even today, because of you, I'm busy with a pounding heart, what are you going to do about it? (Ye yo!)
Sunday, Monday, kiss me, hug me, penetrate my dilemma every day
Cute diligence, watching you single-mindedly
Look this way, that way, this way, which way?
My accelerating heart rate bpm, I like you more day by day, sml
Understand, how selfish of me, a special love after all
This fresh feeling, twinkle, I want to convey it to you, 'Pinko' (Hie)
Brain occupation level is the strongest, untouched homework, forgive me? My charm
Heart beating at its peak, today I've been waiting for, a rendezvous with you
Such delusions end in a melancholic show
Look this way, wait wait, look at me after all, it's embarrassing but
Look this way, I feel like my face reflected in your eyes is red
Our eyes met, our hands touched, just that is a big deal
Hey, because 'about you', what's next, why can't I say it?
Thinking of it behind my eyelids, I like you, I like you, hey
Just thinking about it makes me happy, though truthfully it's a bit painful
See through my bluff, I'm lonely
Actually, I've already exceeded my limits
But I can't say it, I can't say it
Pushing my cowardly heart, want me?
Look this way, wait wait, look at me after all, I want to monopolize you
Look this way, I know I'm being selfish, but, but, but, but
Our eyes meet, my heart beats fast, I turn red, I'm making a hundred faces
Even today, because of you, I'm busy with a pounding heart
God, please, even just a little, please give me courage, 'Swordfish'

scenes.description: La+ Darknesss and a producer character have a short skit in a meeting room.
A transition animation screen that says 'Start in landscape mode' (横画面で開始します).
The song '誰でもいいから付き合いたい' is performed by various Hololive members. Text on screen indicates '作詞・作曲: 40mP'.
scenes.song_title: 誰でもいいから付き合いたい

scenes.description: A second skit involving La+ Darknesss and the producer in the meeting room.
The 'Start in landscape mode' animation loop plays again.
